- The one who removes the last stone is the winner.

text:
from tkinter import *

def show_options():
    # 创建窗口
    root = Tk()

    # 设置窗口标题
    root.title("请选择一个选项")

    # 计算窗口大小和位置
    screen_width = root.winfo_screenwidth()
    screen_height = root.winfo_screenheight()
    window_width = int(screen_width / 5)
    window_height = int(screen_height / 5)
    x = int((screen_width - window_width) / 2)
    y = int((screen_height - window_height) / 2)
    geometry = f"{window_width}x{window_height}+{x}+{y}"
    root.geometry(geometry)

    # 创建面板
    panel = Frame(root)
    panel.pack(padx=10, pady=10)

    # 创建第一个单选框
    var1 = IntVar()
    radio1 = Radiobutton(panel, text="选项1", variable=var1, value=1)
    radio1.pack(side=LEFT)

    # 创建第二个单选框
    var2 = IntVar()
    radio2 = Radiobutton(panel, text="选项2", variable=var2, value=2)
    radio2.pack(side=LEFT)

    # 确认按钮的回调函数
    def confirm():
        result = None
        if var1.get() == 1:
            result = "选项1"
        elif var2.get() == 2:
            result = "选项2"
        root.destroy()
        if result:
            print("您选择的选项是：", result)
        else:
            print("您没有选择任何选项")

    # 创建确认按钮
    ok_button = Button(root, text="确定", command=confirm, width=8)
    ok_button.pack(pady=10)

    # 运行窗口，等待用户操作
    root.mainloop()


# 调用函数显示选项窗口
show_options()
以上代码运行时单选点击一个再点击另一个时前一个的选择没有取消

text: 请告诉我这段话的主谓宾是什么？            As it was published in 1935,  Mules and Men , Zora Neale Hurston's landmark collection of  folktales, may not have been the book that its author first had in mind. In this anthropological  study, Hurston describes in detail the people who tell the stories, often even inserting herself  into the storytelling scene. Evidently, however, Hurston had prepared another version, a  manuscript that was recently discovered and published after having been forgotten since  1929. This version differs from  Mules and Men  in that it simply records stories, with no  descriptive or interpretive information.
